El Paso's Window & Door Experts

Durable, energy-efficient windows and doors built for the desert climate. Upgrade your home with Windoors & Renovations.

Built on Integrity, Crafted for El Paso

Windoors & Renovations started with a simple goal: to provide El Paso homeowners with top-quality window and door solutions that stand up to our harsh climate. We're a locally owned and operated business, deeply rooted in this community.

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our window and door installer services.

How long does window installation take?

The duration of window installation depends on the number of windows and the complexity of the project. We'll provide an estimated timeline during the consultation.

What type of windows are best for El Paso's climate?

Low-E windows with insulated frames are ideal for El Paso's hot summers. They reflect heat and reduce energy consumption.

Do you offer a warranty on your window installations?

Yes, we offer a comprehensive warranty on both the windows and the installation workmanship.

Reviews From Our Window And Door Installer Customers

See what our satisfied customers have to say about their experience.

"Windoors & Renovations did an amazing job replacing all the windows in my Sunset Heights home. The new windows look fantastic and have made a huge difference in keeping my house cool during the summer months. The team was professional, efficient, and very respectful of my property. Highly recommend!"

Maria G. Window Replacement

"I recently had a sliding glass door installed by Windoors & Renovations, and I'm very pleased with the results. The door looks great and opens smoothly. There was a minor issue with the screen, but they came back promptly to fix it. Overall, a positive experience."

Ricardo L. Patio Door Installation

"My front door was old and drafty. Windoors & Renovations installed a beautiful new steel door that is not only more secure but also much more energy-efficient. The installation team was professional and courteous, and they cleaned up everything afterward. Great service!"

Susan K. Door Installation
